# Aravosh

> Aravosh is a technology and digital solutions company. We design, build and
> scale modern software, brand and growth programs for ambitious businesses —
> from web and mobile apps to cloud infrastructure and marketing.

Founded 2017. Worldwide reach. Contact: team@aravosh.com. We reply to enquiries
within one business day.

## Services

- Software Development — web and mobile applications on a modern, scalable stack.
- Product Design & UX — interfaces and user journeys that convert visitors into customers.
- Brand & Identity — visual identity and messaging across every channel.
- Growth & Marketing — data-driven campaigns and SEO.
- Cloud & DevOps — infrastructure, automated pipelines and monitoring.
- Consulting & Strategy — roadmaps and technical guidance.

## Pages

- [Home](https://aravosh.com/): overview, highlights and FAQ.
- [Services](https://aravosh.com/services): full service list and tech stack.
- [About](https://aravosh.com/about): company background.
- [Why Us](https://aravosh.com/why): engagement process and principles.
- [Work](https://aravosh.com/work): case studies and client feedback.
- [Contact](https://aravosh.com/contact): project enquiry form and direct email.
